h1. INFRASTRUCTURE FOR AI-COLLABORATIVE INTELLECTUAL WORK.md

----





h2. INFRASTRUCTURE FOR AI-COLLABORATIVE INTELLECTUAL WORK.md
markdown
{code:language=markdown}
# Infrastructure for AI-Collaborative Intellectual Work

<!-- similar-docs -->

---

- [[151-open-knowledge-work-foundation-md]] (сходство 0.25)

- [[208-professional-colleague-agents-md]] (сходство 0.12)

<!-- backlinks-auto -->
## Упоминается в

- [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]]

<!-- related-auto -->
## Связанные документы

- [[151-open-knowledge-work-foundation-md|OPEN KNOWLEDGE WORK FOUNDATION.md]] _100%_
